---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in HybridPacer
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Press '...'
3. See error / unexpected behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Device & environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Garmin device model | e.g. Forerunner 965 |
| Device firmware version | e.g. 22.21 |
| Connect IQ SDK version used to build | e.g. 7.4.3 |
| HybridPacer version / commit | e.g. v0.7.0 or commit hash |

## Race context (if relevant)

- [ ] Happened during WARMUP
- [ ] Happened during RUN
- [ ] Happened during ROXZONE
- [ ] Happened during STATION
- [ ] Happened at FINISH
- [ ] Happened while PAUSED
- [ ] Happened in doubles/relay mode

## Additional context

Add any other context, logs, screenshots, or `.fit` file excerpts here.
